'''Nahata''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] thug who worked for the [[Exchange]] under the command of [[Benok]] and [[Loppak Slusk]] on [[Citadel Station]], and quickly became one of the more prominent and feared thugs due to his murderous deeds. A confident and ruthless individual who was skilled with [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]], he was a good pairing with [[Matu]] as their two skills, Matu's with blades and Nahata's with blasters, complemented each other well. Nahata went into the [[Skirmishes on Citadel Station|fight]] against the Exile with confidence, but he overestimated his chances. Nahata was killed alongside Benok and Matu by [[Meetra Surik]].

==Behind the scenes==
When the player first meets Nahata, in the cantina, he is an [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]], but when the player next meets him in [[Loppak Slusk]]'s quarters, he appears as a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]]. He may have been a [[Changeling/Legends|changeling]], though this may have been a development oversight.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
